nasb.text: So Bathsheba went in to the king in the bedroom. Now the king was very old, and Abishag the Shunammite was ministering to the king.

esv.text: So Bathsheba went to the king in his chamber (now the king was very old, and Abishag the Shunammite was attending to the king).

cnv.text: 於是拔示巴進到內室去見王。王很老了，書念的女子亞比煞正在服事王。

ccb.text: 拔示芭就进内室去见年迈的王，书念的少女雅比莎正在伺候他。
